author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Sex Celibacy and Relationships - Women-s Order Convention 1987
content:
SANGHARAKSHITA IN SEMINAR

QUESTION AND ANSWERS ON SEX, CELIBACY
AND RELATIONSHIPS IN THE ORDER
[Women's Order Convention 1987]
Contents
1 Celibacy as a necessary part of the process of becoming autonomous
4 Is celibacy a goal of Buddhism?
Is homosexuality closer than heterosexuality in freeing one from one's biological basis?
5 Creative use of erotic fantasy?
9 Openness about sexual relationships
12' Special' relationships and friendships
13 Order members and mitras in sexual relationships together
18 Do true individuals still need intimacy?
22 A mature sexual relationship?
